LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT FLUOR CORPORATION'S MOTION TO STRIKE PLAINTIFFS (1) PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR STRICT LIABILITY; AND (2) PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES FROM COMPLAINT. MOTION To Strike Plaintiffs Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-25-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT FLUOR CORPORATION'S MOTION to Strike Plaintiffs (1) Plaintiff's Claim for Strict Liability; and (2) Plaintiff's Claim for Punitive Damages from Complaint. Appearances: Jennifer Alesio, Esq. of Brayton Purcell LLC, (415) 898-1555, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Lisa H. Mahl, Esq. of Foley & Mansfield (510) 590-9500, appearing for Defendant Fluor Corporation and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Punitive Damages Claim is Moot. The Court is addressing the Strict Liability Issue only: Motion to strike denied. Ten days leave to answer. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW/JW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
